data.title: Global Communication
data.description: Provides a platform that breaks geopolitical barriers for seamless global communication.
data.technical_spec: Supports multiple languages and international calling features.

data.title: Privacy Focus
data.description: Centric to WhatsApp's identity is the emphasis on personal privacy.
data.technical_spec: End-to-end encryption and stringent data privacy policies.

data.title: Community Connection
data.description: Facilitates community building and personalized connections through group chats and broadcast lists.
data.technical_spec: Supports large group chats and community discussions via broadcast messages.

data.title: Accessibility
data.description: Ensures messaging and call features are accessible to diverse users, regardless of tech literacy.
data.technical_spec: Optimized for low-bandwidth environments and supports older devices.

data.title: Innovation in Communication
data.description: Continuously innovating to enhance the communication experience with new features.
data.technical_spec: Regular updates introducing new functionalities and improving existing ones.
